securePaymentsDesc: Bank-level security for all your transactions
smartInvoicingDesc: Create and send professional invoices in minutes
realTimeAnalyticsDesc: Track your finances with detailed insights
collectionsDesc: Receive and track payments from customers efficiently
disbursementsDesc: Send payments to individuals and businesses seamlessly
helpTooltipMessage: If you need help on a page, click here whilst on that page
name: Name
errorRecorded: We've recorded the error. You can try reloading the page.
enter4DigitPIN: Enter your 4-digit security PIN to authorize this transaction
authenticationFailedLogout: Authentication failed. Please log out and log back in to continue.
setSecurityPinBeforeAction: You need to set a security PIN before you can perform this action

versionUpdate.title: New features available!
versionUpdate.message: We've added new improvements to make your experience better. Click refresh to get them now.

offline.connectionRestored: Connection restored. You are back online.
offline.currentlyOffline: You are currently offline. Please check your internet connection.

dashboard.verificationLevel: Your verification level determines your transaction limits. Higher levels allow larger transactions. Click here to view your verification status and upgrade your level.
dashboard.walletBalance: Your total wallet balance available for transactions.
dashboard.collections: Total money received from invoices and payments.
dashboard.netCashflow: Your net cash flow: collections minus disbursements.
dashboard.chart: Interactive chart showing your financial trends over time.
dashboard.quickActions: Quick access to add money, transfer funds, create invoices, and more.
dashboard.transactions: View and search all your recent transactions here. Note: Your session automatically expires after 30 minutes of inactivity for security.

reports.analyticsBtn: Click this button to open the comprehensive analytics modal with charts, insights, and advanced filtering.
reports.filters: Use these filters to select date range, payment type, and transaction status to customize your report.
reports.summary: View key metrics: total volume, transaction count, success rate, and average transaction value with trends.
reports.table: Review detailed transaction list with 5 items per page. Export to Excel or navigate through pages.

security.sessionTimeout: Your session automatically expires after 30 minutes of inactivity for security. You'll see a warning 5 minutes before timeout with the option to extend your session or logout immediately.
security.twoFactor: Enable two-factor authentication for an extra layer of security. This requires a verification code from your email or authenticator app when logging in.
security.password: Keep your password secure and change it regularly. Use a strong password with letters, numbers, and special characters.
security.activity: Monitor your account activity for any unauthorized access. You can view recent login attempts and account changes here.

sms.typeAudienceEncoding: Select SMS type (promotional/transactional/OTP), choose your audience (quick list or file upload), and set encoding.
sms.senderId: Enter your Sender ID - this is the name or number that will appear as the sender of your SMS.
sms.recipients: Enter phone numbers manually or upload a CSV file with contacts. Multiple numbers can be separated by commas.
sms.message: Type your SMS message here. The character count and SMS units will be calculated automatically.
sms.calculator: SMS Unit Calculator shows how many SMS units your message will use. Each 160 characters equals 1 unit.
sms.submit: Review everything and click here to send your SMS to all recipients.

utilities.electricity: Pay your electricity bills quickly and securely. Support for prepaid and postpaid meters.
utilities.water: Settle your water bills with ease. Enter your meter number and amount to pay.
utilities.internet: Purchase internet data bundles for your mobile devices. Choose your network and bundle package.
utilities.tv: Pay for cable TV subscriptions like DStv and GOtv. Select your provider and subscription package.
utilities.phone: Top up airtime for any mobile network. Quick and convenient mobile money recharges.

settlements.summary: View your settlement summary: total settlements, mobile money payouts, and bank transfers. Track your settlement activity at a glance.
settlements.history: Browse your complete settlement history. See all past transactions with details like reference, date, method, amount, charges, and status.
settlements.request: Raise a new settlement request here. Choose between full or partial payout, enter the amount, and submit your request for review.

settings.navigation: Navigate between different settings sections using these tabs. Each section helps you manage different aspects of your account.

profile.personal: Your personal information including name and phone number. These fields are read-only and cannot be changed here.
profile.address: Update your address information including country, city, area, and digital address (Ghana Post GPS).
profile.preferences: Customize your preferences: currency, language, notification method, theme, and timezone. Changes are saved locally and synced with your account.

paymentMethods.tabs: Switch between Mobile Money, Bank Accounts, and Settlement Configuration tabs to manage different payment methods.
paymentMethods.mobile: Add or manage your mobile money wallet for receiving payouts. You can set one mobile money account as default.
paymentMethods.bank: Add or manage bank accounts for receiving settlements. Configure account details and set a default bank account.
paymentMethods.settlement: Configure your settlement preferences. Choose automatic or manual settlement mode and select default payment methods for payouts.

security.summary: View your account security status at a glance. See if security PIN and two-factor authentication are enabled.
security.pin: Set or update your 4-digit security PIN. This PIN is required to authorize transactions and secure your account.
security.twoFactor: Enable two-factor authentication for extra security. Scan the QR code with an authenticator app to get verification codes.
security.password: Change your account password. You will be logged out after changing your password and will need to log in again.
security.session: Session timeout is automatically enabled for your security. Your session expires after 30 minutes of inactivity with a 5-minute warning. This protects your account from unauthorized access.

verification.levels: View all verification levels and their transaction limits. Higher levels require more documents but allow larger transactions.
verification.email: Verify your email address. Request a verification token and enter it here to complete email verification.
verification.phone: Verify your phone number. Request an OTP code and enter it here to complete phone verification.
verification.documents: Upload required documents to increase your verification level. Upload government-issued ID, proof of address, and other required documents.

business.info: Update your business information including trading name, description, staff size, expected revenue, and TIN number.
business.owners: Manage business owners and their information. Add owner details including ownership percentage and identification documents.
business.bank: Configure business bank accounts for receiving payments. Add multiple bank accounts and set a default account.

api.generate: Generate new API keys for integrating with iSmartPay. Provide your email, password, and a description for the key.
api.keys: View all your API keys here. Copy keys to use in your applications. Keep your API keys secure and never share them publicly.

team.overview: View all your teams and manage team members. Create new teams or select existing teams to manage permissions.
team.permissions: Control which pages each team can access. Enable or disable access to collections, disbursements, invoicing, and other sections.
team.members: Manage team members for each team. Invite new members by email and remove members from teams as needed.
